title: Floral Creamy German Coriander Soup
description: A fragrant, creamy German soup that blends aromatic coriander with a subtle floral note, perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: In a medium pot, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in butter and let it melt, then add ground coriander, cumin, and smoked paprika. Cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a gentle simmer. Reduce heat, cover, and let simmer for 10 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Add low‑fat cream and fresh coriander leaves. Simmer gently for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season with salt, pepper, lemon juice, and sugar to taste. Use a hand blender to puree the soup until silky smooth.
Return to heat, warm through, adjust seasoning if needed, and serve hot, garnished with a few extra coriander leaves.
